items.title: 'Despicable and reprehensible': China lashes out at UK expansion of visa scheme following Jimmy Lai conviction
items.description: The diplomatic tensions came after pro-democracy tycoon Jimmy Lai was sentenced for 20 years in one of the city's most prominent prosecutions.

items.title: Trump bashed Epstein to Palm Beach police during first investigation, called Maxwell 'evil,' record shows

items.title: U.S. urges ships to stay 'as far as possible' from Iran's waters in Strait of Hormuz after boarding attempts
items.description: The U.S. told American-flagged ships to stay "as far as possible" from Iranian waters when navigating the Strait of Hormuz amid heightened U.S.-Iran t...

items.title: Housing affordability package set to advance in Congress amid home-cost concerns
items.description: Wide-ranging legislation would reduce regulations for homebuilders while giving local governments incentives to streamline the building process.

items.title: Tulsi Gabbard to testify at Senate Intelligence Committee amid election probe concerns
items.description: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard has said she was at a Georgia election center during an FBI raid at the direction of President Trump.
